title: The Institutes of Technology Act, 1961
full_text: The Institutes of Technology Act, 1961 प्रौद्योगिकी संस्‍थान अधिनियम, 1961 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 196159 Act Number: 59 Enactment Date: 1961-12-19 Act Year: 1961 Short Title: The Institutes of Technology Act, 1961 Hindi Title: प्रौद्योगिकी संस्‍थान अधिनियम, 1961 Long Title: An Act to declare certain institutions of technology to be institutions of national importance and to provide for certain matters connected with such institutions and the Indian Institute of Technology, Kharagpur. Ministry: Ministry of Education Department: Department of Higher Education Enforcement Date: 01-04-1962 Notification: 1st April, 1962, vide notification No. S.O. 929, dated 23rd March, 1962, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The Institutes of Technology Act, 1961 CHAPTER I PRELIMINARY CHAPER II THE INSTITUTES CHAPTER III THE COUNCIL CHAPTER IV MISCELLANEOUS Section 1. Short title and commencement. Show Related Subordinates Section 2. Declaration of certain institutions as institutions of national importance. Section 3. Definitions. Section 4. Incorporation of institutes. Section 5. Effect of incorporation of institutes. Section 5A. Effect of incorporation of Institute of Technology, Roorkee. Section 5B. Effect of incorporation of Indian Institute of Technology (Banaras Hindu University), Varanasi. Section 6. Powers of Institutes. Section 7. Institutes to be open to all races, creeds and classes. Section 8. Teaching at Institute. Section 9. Visitor. Section 10. Authorities of Institutes. Section 11. Board of Governors. Section 12. Term of office of, vacancies among, and allowances payable to, members of Board. Section 13. Functions of Board. Section 14. Senate. Section 15. Functions of Senate. Section 16. Chairman of Board. Section 17. Director. Section 18. Deputy Director. Section 19. Registrar. Section 20. Other authorities and officers. Section 21. Grants by Central Government. Section 22. Fund of the Institute. Section 23. Accounts and audit. Section 24. Pension and provident fund. Section 25. Appointments. Section 26. Statutes. Section 27. Statutes how made. Section 28. Ordinances. Section 29. Ordinances how made. Section 30. Tribunal of Arbitration. Section 31. Establishment of Council. Section 32. Term of office of, vacancies among, and allowances payable to, members of Council. Section 33. Functions of Council. Section 34. Chairman of Council. Section 35. Power to make rules in respect of matters in this Chapter. Section 36. Acts and proceedings not to be invalidated by vacancies. Section 37. Power to remove difficulties. Section 38. Transitional provisions. Section 39. Repeal and savings. Schedule 1.
